Module 6 - Lesson 2
Maximization Offer #1: The Reverse 	Add-On

-- 1 of 3 --

Module 6 - Lesson 2
Elements Of The Reverse Add-On Offer:!
•Congruent With Customer Captivation Offer!
•Adds Value To Customer Captivation Offer!
•Does NOT Imply Customer Captivation Is Incomplete!
•Leverages Typical Consumer Add-On Psychology!
•*Priced Up To 80% Of Customer Captivation Offer!
•Presented As VSL (No ATC Delay) or Short-Form Sales
Letter
Maximization Offer #1: The Reverse 	Add-On

-- 2 of 3 --

Module 6 - Lesson 2
Example:
Maximization Offer #1: The Reverse 	Add-On
Initial Offer Price:!
$297.00
Reverse Add-On Offer Price:!
$199.00!
(67% of Initial Offer)

-- 3 of 3 --
